description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a large, paved driveway leading up to the main entrance. The structure features a mix of light and dark exterior materials, including a prominent use of brick and glass, with wooden accents visible along the facade. The front of the bungalow is characterized by a covered porch area supported by columns, and large windows that allow for ample natural light. A green lawn wraps around the building, with a distinctive L-shaped path providing access to the property. The roof includes both solid and slatted sections, suggesting areas for skylights or covered outdoor spaces. A car is parked in the driveway, emphasizing the residential and accessible nature of the property.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a covered porch, and a spacious driveway with an L-shaped green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, large windows, driveway, and L-shaped green lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick exterior, slatted roof section, and the continuation of the green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view with a focus on the solid roof, brick wall, and the driveway extending to the side.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the driveway, porch columns, and the green path leading to the entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
